description: Style Note Lend a new season twist to your wardrobe with this pair of red chief sandals. Crafted from the highest quality leather (that's also recyclable!) which won't burn a hole in your pocket - this is your go-to option for comfy leather footwear! Product Details Light Khaki sandal with forefoot and midfoot straps (has a toe separator and rivet details on the upper) Padded and perforated footbed Thick TPU outsole upraised at the heel, has textured grooves Material and Care Leather Wipe with clean dry cloth to remove dust Do not store under direct sunlight
